text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Voie d'administration - Si la voie d'administration est connue, elle doit être indiquée (code et displayName).  - Si elle n'est pas connue, la raison pour laquelle elle est inconnue peut être décrite en utilisant l'attribut nullFlavor.<br class="binding"/><span style="font-weight:bold" title="null" class="binding">Binding: </span><a href="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/terminologies/1.10.0/ValueSet-jdv-route-of-administration-cisis.html" title="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-route-of-administration-cisis" class="binding">JDV Route Of Administration CISIS</a><span title="null" class="binding"> (</span><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/terminologies.html#required" title="To be conformant, the concept in this element SHALL be from the specified value set." class="binding">required</a><span title="null" class="binding">)</span></td></tr>

text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-CD.html">CD</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">région anatomique d'administration<br class="binding"/><span style="font-weight:bold" title="null" class="binding">Binding: </span><a href="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/terminologies/1.10.0/ValueSet-jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis.html" title="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis" class="binding">JDV Human Substance Administration Site CISIS</a><span title="null" class="binding"> (</span><a href="http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/terminologies.html#required" title="To be conformant, the concept in this element SHALL be from the specified value set." class="binding">required</a><span title="null" class="binding">)</span></td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity" title="Dose à administrer">doseQuantity</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVL-PQ.html">IVL_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Dose à administrer. Dans le cas où la posologie n'est pas structurée et décrite uniquement dans la partie narrative , cet élément ne doit pas être présent
Dans le cas où la posologie est structurée et que le mode d'administration est 'normal' , la dose à administrer est obligatoire (nullFlavor interdit). Dans les autres cas , la dose à administrer peut être fournie.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity" title="Rythme d'administration">rateQuantity</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-IVL-PQ.html">IVL_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Rythme d'administration. Dans le cas où la posologie n'est pas structurée et décrite uniquement dans la partie narrative , cet élément ne doit pas être présent. 
Dans le cas où la posologie est structurée et que le mode d'administration est 'normal' , le rythme d'administration est obligatoire (nullFlavor interdit). Dans les autres cas , le rythme d'administration peut être fourni</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck11.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity" title="Dose maximale">maxDoseQuantity</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-RTO-PQ-PQ.html">RTO_PQ_PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Dose maximale. La dose maximale à 'maxDoseQuantity' permet d'indiquer la quantité maximale de produit à administrer par unité de temps. Plusieurs occurrences de 'maxDoseQuantity' peuvent être utilisées pour indiquer différentes limites sur différentes périodes de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'numerator' et 'denominator' permettent de fournir :
- numerator : la quantité maximale à administrer,
- denominator : la plage de temps sur laquelle s'applique ce maximum. 
Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck110.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator">numerator</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-PQ.html">PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck100.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vline.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator">denominator</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">1..<span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-PQ.html">PQ</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_resource.png" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Ressource" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.consumable" title="Produit de santé">consumable</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.consumable"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-produit-de-sante.html" title="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ManufacturedProduct">FRCDAProduitDeSante</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Produit de santé</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; <tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck01.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: white; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.precondition" title="Précondition à l'utilisation du médicament">precondition</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.precondition"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">0</span>..1</td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-Precondition.html">Precondition</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy">Précondition à l'utilisation du médicament. Permet de décrire les conditions préalables à l'utilisation du médicament. L'attribut @value de l'élément 'reference' est une URI qui pointe vers la partie narrative du document CDA décrivant ces conditions préalables.</td></tr>
<tr style="border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7"><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck001.png)" class="hierarchy"><img src="tbl_spacer.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_blank.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="tbl_vjoin_end.png" alt="." style="background-color: inherit" class="hierarchy"/><img src="icon_element.gif" alt="." style="background-color: #F7F7F7; background-color: inherit" title="Element" class="hierarchy"/> <a href="StructureDefinition-fr-cda-item-plan-traitement-definitions.html#SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion">criterion</a><a name="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion"> </a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red" title="Cet élément doit être pris en charge">S</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">..</span><span style="opacity: 0.5">1</span></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"><a style="opacity: 0.5; opacity: 0.5" href="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/2.0.1-sd/StructureDefinition-Criterion.html">Criterion</a></td><td style="vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px" class="hierarchy"/></tr>

  <description
               value="Entrée FR-Item-plan-traitement: IHE-MTP Medication Treatment Plan Item. Cette entrée permet de fournir une copie du plan de traitement médicamenteux."/>

                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type.       <base>

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition
                  value="A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.1.24"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:ccdMedicationActivity.extension">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheMedicationsEntry"/>
      <short value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications IHE PCC"/>
      <definition value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications IHE PCC"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry.displayable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition
                  value="A unique identifier that guarantees the global uniqueness of the instance identifier. The root alone may be the entire instance identifier."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.7"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry.extension">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="frItemPlanTraitement"/>
      <short value="Conformité de l'entrée FR-Item-plan-traitement (CI-SIS)"/>

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      <binding>

                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:frItemPlanTraitement.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:frItemPlanTraitement.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition

             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:frItemPlanTraitement.extension">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>

                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.classCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.classCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.classCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <fixedCode value="SBADM"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAActClass"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="INT"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xDocumentSubstanceMood|2.0.0"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.id">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.id"/>
      <short value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.id"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code"/>
      <short value="Code de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Code de l'entrée"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAActSubstanceAdministrationCode"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="DRUG"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.5.4"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="HL7_ActCode"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.displayName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternString value="Médicament"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.originalText">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.qualifier">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.negationInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text"/>
      <short value="Partie narrative de l’entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode"/>
      <short value="Statut de l’entrée"/>
      <definition value="Statut de l’entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActStatus"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.code"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code"/>
      <definition
                  value="The plain code symbol defined by the code system. For example, &quot;784.0&quot; is the code symbol of the ICD-9 code &quot;784.0&quot; for headache."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternCode value="completed"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystem"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System"/>
      <definition value="Specifies the code system that defines the code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystem"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Name"/>
      <definition value="The common name of the coding system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemVersion">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.codeSystemVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Code System Version"/>
      <definition
                  value="If applicable, a version descriptor defined specifically for the given code system."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.codeSystemVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.displayName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.displayName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Display Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A name or title for the code, under which the sending system shows the code value to its users."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.displayName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSet">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSet"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSet"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSet extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.valueSet"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSetVersion">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="valueSetVersion"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The valueSetVersion extension adds an attribute for elements with a CD dataType which indicates the version of the particular value set constraining the coded concept."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.sdtcValueSetVersion"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.originalText">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.originalText"/>
      <label value="Original Text"/>
      <definition
                  value="The text or phrase used as the basis for the coding."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.originalText"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.qualifier">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.qualifier"/>
      <label value="Qualifier"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies additional codes that increase the specificity of the the primary code."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.qualifier"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CR"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.translation">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.translation"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <label value="Translation"/>
      <definition
                  value="A set of other concept descriptors that translate this concept descriptor into other code systems."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="0"/>
      <base>
        <path value="CD.translation"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-defaulttype">
        <valueCanonical
                        value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="pattern"/>
          <path value="operator"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:frEffectiveTimeDuree">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-defaulttype">
        <valueCanonical
                        value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <sliceName value="frEffectiveTimeDuree"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-operator-not-a-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="operator doit être différent de A"/>
        <expression value="operator != 'A'"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-effectiveTime-duree-type-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="La durée doit être IVL-TS"/>
        <expression value="is(IVL_TS)"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:frEffectiveTimeFrequence">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-defaulttype">
        <valueCanonical
                        value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <sliceName value="frEffectiveTimeFrequence"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXCM-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-operator-a-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="operator doit être A"/>
        <expression value="operator = 'A'"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-effectiveTime-frequence-types-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="La fréquence doit être SXCM-TS, PIVL-TS, EIVL-TS ou SXPR-TS"/>
        <expression
                    value="is(SXCM_TS) or is(PIVL_TS) or is(EIVL_TS) or is(SXPR_TS)"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.priorityCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.priorityCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.priorityCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActPriority"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.repeatNumber">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.repeatNumber"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.repeatNumber"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-INT"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode"/>
      <short
             value="Voie d'administration - Si la voie d'administration est connue, elle doit être indiquée (code et displayName).  - Si elle n'est pas connue, la raison pour laquelle elle est inconnue peut être décrite en utilisant l'attribut nullFlavor."/>
      <definition value="Voie d'administration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-route-of-administration-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode"/>
      <short value="région anatomique d'administration"/>
      <definition value="région anatomique d'administration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Dose à administrer. Dans le cas où la posologie n'est pas structurée et décrite uniquement dans la partie narrative , cet élément ne doit pas être présent
Dans le cas où la posologie est structurée et que le mode d'administration est 'normal' , la dose à administrer est obligatoire (nullFlavor interdit). Dans les autres cas , la dose à administrer peut être fournie."/>
      <definition value="Dose à administrer"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Rythme d'administration. Dans le cas où la posologie n'est pas structurée et décrite uniquement dans la partie narrative , cet élément ne doit pas être présent. 
Dans le cas où la posologie est structurée et que le mode d'administration est 'normal' , le rythme d'administration est obligatoire (nullFlavor interdit). Dans les autres cas , le rythme d'administration peut être fourni"/>
      <definition value="Rythme d'administration"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Dose maximale. La dose maximale à 'maxDoseQuantity' permet d'indiquer la quantité maximale de produit à administrer par unité de temps. Plusieurs occurrences de 'maxDoseQuantity' peuvent être utilisées pour indiquer différentes limites sur différentes périodes de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'numerator' et 'denominator' permettent de fournir :
- numerator : la quantité maximale à administrer,
- denominator : la plage de temps sur laquelle s'applique ce maximum. 
Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM."/>
      <definition value="Dose maximale"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/RTO-PQ-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator"/>
      <label value="Numerator"/>
      <definition
                  value="The quantity that is being divided in the ratio. The default is the integer number 1 (one.)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="RTO_PQ_PQ.numerator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator"/>
      <label value="Denominator"/>
      <definition
                  value="The quantity that devides the numerator in the ratio. The default is the integer number 1 (one.) The denominator must not be zero."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="RTO_PQ_PQ.denominator"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.administrationUnitCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.administrationUnitCode"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.administrationUnitCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-AdministrableDrugForm"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable"/>
      <short value="Produit de santé"/>
      <definition value="Produit de santé"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable"/>
        <min value="1"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ManufacturedProduct"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-produit-de-sante"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SubstanceAdministration"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>

      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      </type>
      <patternCode value="RSON"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-xActRelationshipEntryRelationship"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.negationInd">

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

      <max value="*"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>

                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.typeId.nullFlavor">

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <label value="Displayable"/>

      <max value="1"/>
      <base>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
