        <strength value="required"/>

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>

      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <patternBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.negationInd">

      <type>

      <max value="1"/>

        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.typeId.displayable">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

        <max value="1"/>

        <profile

      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>

                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.nullFlavor"/>

      </type>
      <binding>

                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>

    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.typeId.displayable">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <max value="1"/>

        <max value="1"/>
      </base>

        <profile

        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>

        <max value="1"/>

    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.inversionInd can be set to &quot;true&quot; to indicate that the relationship should be interpreted as if the roles of the source and target entries were reversed."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.contextConductionInd">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>

            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <definition
                  value="The entryRelationship.contextConductionInd differs from the otherwise common use of this attribute in that in all other cases where this attribute is used, the value is fixed at &quot;true&quot;, whereas here the value is defaulted to &quot;true&quot;, and can be changed to &quot;false&quot; when referencing an entry in the same document. Setting the context conduction to false when referencing an entry in the same document keeps clear the fact that the referenced object retains its original context."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.contextConductionInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
      <defaultValueBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frAutorisationSubstitution.negationInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.negationInd"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="EntryRelationship.negationInd"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>

      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.reference"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Reference"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition"/>
      <short
             value="Précondition à l'utilisation du médicament. Permet de décrire les conditions préalables à l'utilisation du médicament. L'attribut @value de l'élément 'reference' est une URI qui pointe vers la partie narrative du document CDA décrivant ces conditions préalables."/>
      <definition value="Précondition à l'utilisation du médicament"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Precondition"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.realmCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.realmCode"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of realm-specific constraints. The value of this attribute identifies the realm in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.realmCode"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of constraints defined in an HL7-specified message type. This might be a common type (also known as CMET in the messaging communication environment), or content included within a wrapper. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the type in question."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.typeId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <constraint>
        <key value="II-1"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="An II instance must have either a root or an nullFlavor."/>
        <expression value="root.exists() or nullFlavor.exists()"/>
        <source
                value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InfrastructureRoot"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.nullFlavor">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.nullFlavor"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Exceptional Value Detail"/>
      <definition
                  value="If a value is an exceptional value (NULL-value), this specifies in what way and why proper information is missing."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="ANY.nullFlavor"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="code"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/cs-simple"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDANullFlavor"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.assigningAuthorityName">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.assigningAuthorityName"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Assigning Authority Name"/>
      <definition
                  value="A human readable name or mnemonic for the assigning authority. The Assigning Authority Name has no computational value. The purpose of a Assigning Authority Name is to assist an unaided human interpreter of an II value to interpret the authority. Note: no automated processing must depend on the assigning authority name to be present in any form."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.assigningAuthorityName"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.displayable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.displayable"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Displayable"/>
      <definition
                  value="Specifies if the identifier is intended for human display and data entry (displayable = true) as opposed to pure machine interoperation (displayable = false)."/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.displayable"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="boolean"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/bl-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.root"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Root"/>
      <definition value="Identifies the type as an HL7 Registered model"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.root"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/oid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/uuid"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ruid"/>
      </type>
      <fixedString value="2.16.840.1.113883.1.3"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.extension">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.typeId.extension"/>
      <representation value="xmlAttr"/>
      <label value="Extension"/>
      <definition
                  value="A character string as a unique identifier within the scope of the identifier root."/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="II.extension"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="string"/>
        <profile
                 value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/st-simple"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.templateId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.templateId"/>
      <definition
                  value="When valued in an instance, this attribute signals the imposition of a set of template-defined constraints. The value of this attribute provides a unique identifier for the templates in question"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="InfrastructureRoot.templateId"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>

        <max value="1"/>

      <type>

        <profile

      </type>
      <fixedCode value="PRCN"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/ValueSet/CDAActRelationshipType"/>
      </binding>
    </element>

        <path value="Criterion.code"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <binding>
        <strength value="example"/>
        <valueSet value="http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-ActCode"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.text">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.text"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Criterion.text"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.value">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.value"/>
      <representation value="typeAttr"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <base>
        <path value="Criterion.value"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="1"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/BL"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ED"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ST"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CD"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CV"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/CE"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SC"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/II"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TEL"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/AD"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EN"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/INT"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/REAL"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PQ"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/MO"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-PQ"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/IVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/PIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/EIVL-TS"/>
      </type>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SXPR-TS"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.sdtcInFulfillmentOf1">
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-namespace">
        <valueUri value="urn:hl7-org:sdtc"/>
      </extension>
      <extension
                 url="http://hl7.org/fhir/tools/StructureDefinition/xml-name">
        <valueString value="inFulfillmentOf1"/>
      </extension>
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.sdtcInFulfillmentOf1"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <base>
        <path value="SubstanceAdministration.sdtcInFulfillmentOf1"/>
        <min value="0"/>
        <max value="*"/>
      </base>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/InFulfillmentOf1"/>
      </type>
    </element>
  </snapshot>
  <differential>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="root"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <min value="4"/>
      <max value="4"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationTreatmentPlanItem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheMedicationTreatmentPlanItem"/>
      <short
             value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications IHE Pharm Suppl. MTP"/>
      <definition
                  value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications IHE Pharm Suppl. MTP"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationTreatmentPlanItem.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.9.1.3.7"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:ccdMedicationActivity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="ccdMedicationActivity"/>
      <short value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications CCD"/>
      <definition value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications CCD"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:ccdMedicationActivity.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.10.20.1.24"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="iheMedicationsEntry"/>
      <short value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications IHE PCC"/>
      <definition value="Conformité de l'entrée aux spécifications IHE PCC"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:iheMedicationsEntry.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.3.6.1.4.1.19376.1.5.3.1.4.7"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:frItemPlanTraitement">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId"/>
      <sliceName value="frItemPlanTraitement"/>
      <short value="Conformité de l'entrée FR-Item-plan-traitement (CI-SIS)"/>
      <definition
                  value="Conformité de l'entrée FR-Item-plan-traitement (CI-SIS)"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.templateId:frItemPlanTraitement.root">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.templateId.root"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="1.2.250.1.213.1.1.3.96"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.classCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.classCode"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.moodCode"/>
      <patternCode value="INT"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.id">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.id"/>
      <short value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Identifiant de l'entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code"/>
      <short value="Code de l'entrée"/>
      <definition value="Code de l'entrée"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.code"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternCode value="DRUG"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystem">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystem"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <patternString value="2.16.840.1.113883.5.4"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.codeSystemName"/>
      <patternString value="HL7_ActCode"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.code.displayName">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.code.displayName"/>
      <patternString value="Médicament"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.text">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.text"/>
      <short value="Partie narrative de l’entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode"/>
      <short value="Statut de l’entrée"/>
      <definition value="Statut de l’entrée"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.code">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.statusCode.code"/>
      <patternCode value="completed"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="pattern"/>
          <path value="operator"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:frEffectiveTimeDuree">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <sliceName value="frEffectiveTimeDuree"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-operator-not-a-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="operator doit être différent de A"/>
        <expression value="operator != 'A'"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-effectiveTime-duree-type-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="La durée doit être IVL-TS"/>
        <expression value="is(IVL_TS)"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime:frEffectiveTimeFrequence">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.effectiveTime"/>
      <sliceName value="frEffectiveTimeFrequence"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-operator-a-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human value="operator doit être A"/>
        <expression value="operator = 'A'"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
      <constraint>
        <key value="fr-effectiveTime-frequence-types-item-plan-traitement"/>
        <severity value="error"/>
        <human
               value="La fréquence doit être SXCM-TS, PIVL-TS, EIVL-TS ou SXPR-TS"/>
        <expression
                    value="is(SXCM_TS) or is(PIVL_TS) or is(EIVL_TS) or is(SXPR_TS)"/>
        <source
                value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-item-plan-traitement"/>
      </constraint>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.routeCode"/>
      <short
             value="Voie d'administration - Si la voie d'administration est connue, elle doit être indiquée (code et displayName).  - Si elle n'est pas connue, la raison pour laquelle elle est inconnue peut être décrite en utilisant l'attribut nullFlavor."/>
      <definition value="Voie d'administration"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-route-of-administration-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.approachSiteCode"/>
      <short value="région anatomique d'administration"/>
      <definition value="région anatomique d'administration"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
      <binding>
        <strength value="required"/>
        <valueSet
                  value="https://smt.esante.gouv.fr/fhir/ValueSet/jdv-human-substance-administration-site-cisis"/>
      </binding>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.doseQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Dose à administrer. Dans le cas où la posologie n'est pas structurée et décrite uniquement dans la partie narrative , cet élément ne doit pas être présent
Dans le cas où la posologie est structurée et que le mode d'administration est 'normal' , la dose à administrer est obligatoire (nullFlavor interdit). Dans les autres cas , la dose à administrer peut être fournie."/>
      <definition value="Dose à administrer"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.rateQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Rythme d'administration. Dans le cas où la posologie n'est pas structurée et décrite uniquement dans la partie narrative , cet élément ne doit pas être présent. 
Dans le cas où la posologie est structurée et que le mode d'administration est 'normal' , le rythme d'administration est obligatoire (nullFlavor interdit). Dans les autres cas , le rythme d'administration peut être fourni"/>
      <definition value="Rythme d'administration"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity"/>
      <short
             value="Dose maximale. La dose maximale à 'maxDoseQuantity' permet d'indiquer la quantité maximale de produit à administrer par unité de temps. Plusieurs occurrences de 'maxDoseQuantity' peuvent être utilisées pour indiquer différentes limites sur différentes périodes de temps.
Les sous-éléments 'numerator' et 'denominator' permettent de fournir :
- numerator : la quantité maximale à administrer,
- denominator : la plage de temps sur laquelle s'applique ce maximum. 
Les unités sont exprimées selon le système de codage UCUM."/>
      <definition value="Dose maximale"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.numerator"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.maxDoseQuantity.denominator"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.consumable">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.consumable"/>
      <short value="Produit de santé"/>
      <definition value="Produit de santé"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/ManufacturedProduct"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-produit-de-sante"/>
      </type>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.author">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.author"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="$this"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.author:frAuteurDuTraitement">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.author"/>
      <sliceName value="frAuteurDuTraitement"/>
      <short value="Auteur du traitement"/>
      <definition value="Auteur du traitement"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Author"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.author:frAuteurDuPlanDeTraitement">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.author"/>
      <sliceName value="frAuteurDuPlanDeTraitement"/>
      <short value="Auteur du Plan de traitement"/>
      <definition value="Auteur du Plan de traitement"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Author"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-author"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <slicing>
        <discriminator>
          <type value="value"/>
          <path value="$this"/>
        </discriminator>
        <rules value="open"/>
      </slicing>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frReferenceInterne"/>
      <short value="Entrée Motif du traitement (Référence interne)"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="RSON"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frReferenceInterne.act">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-reference-interne"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frTraitementPrescritSubordonne"/>
      <short value="Entrée Traitement subordonné"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frTraitementPrescritSubordonne.substanceAdministration">
      <path
            value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.substanceAdministration"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/SubstanceAdministration"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-traitement-prescrit-subordonne"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frInstructionsAuPatient"/>
      <short value="Entrée Instructions au patient"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="SUBJ"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <patternBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuPatient.act">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-instructions-au-patient"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frInstructionsAuDispensateur"/>
      <short value="Entrée Instructions au dispensateur"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="SUBJ"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.inversionInd">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.inversionInd"/>
      <patternBoolean value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frInstructionsAuDispensateur.act">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-instructions-au-dispensateur"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frQuantiteDeProduit"/>
      <short value="Entrée Quantité à dispenser"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="1"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frQuantiteDeProduit.supply">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.supply"/>
      <type>
        <code
              value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Supply"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-quantite-de-produit"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frAutorisationSubstitution">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship"/>
      <sliceName value="frAutorisationSubstitution"/>
      <short value="Entrée Autorisation de substitution"/>
      <min value="0"/>
      <max value="*"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frAutorisationSubstitution.typeCode">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.typeCode"/>
      <patternCode value="COMP"/>
    </element>
    <element
             id="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship:frAutorisationSubstitution.act">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.entryRelationship.act"/>
      <type>
        <code value="http://hl7.org/cda/stds/core/StructureDefinition/Act"/>
        <profile
                 value="https://interop.esante.gouv.fr/ig/document/core/StructureDefinition/fr-cda-autorisation-substitution"/>
      </type>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition"/>
      <short
             value="Précondition à l'utilisation du médicament. Permet de décrire les conditions préalables à l'utilisation du médicament. L'attribut @value de l'élément 'reference' est une URI qui pointe vers la partie narrative du document CDA décrivant ces conditions préalables."/>
      <definition value="Précondition à l'utilisation du médicament"/>
      <max value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
    <element id="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.text">
      <path value="SubstanceAdministration.precondition.criterion.text"/>
      <min value="1"/>
      <mustSupport value="true"/>
    </element>
  </differential>
